claim: Cross-check confirms explorer's claim: YOLO demand evidence dispatch implements scope validation and external research support with clear separation between project facts and external evidence.

evidence.summary: VALID_EVIDENCE_SCOPES confirms four valid scopes: project, external, user, unknown
evidence.why: Independently verifies explorer's evidence record for scope taxonomy definition

evidence.summary: Agent prompt includes external research instruction: 'If the demand explicitly asks for external research/fetch/search, actually use WebFetch/WebSearch when available and record those records as scope=external; if the tool is unavailable, put that in missing.'
evidence.why: Confirms external research support implementation with explicit scope marking requirement

evidence.summary: Research profile conditional logic: 'toolProfile.includes("research") ? "- WebFetch/WebSearch are allowed for external research; mark those records as scope=external and do not use them as project facts." : "- External research tools may be available; mark external records as scope=external and do not use them as project facts."'
evidence.why: Verifies external research tool enablement with scope separation, confirming both research profile path and non-research profile path
Independently confirms tool profile normalization logic for research-related profiles

evidence.summary: evidenceScopeErrors() validates every evidence record declares valid scope from VALID_EVIDENCE_SCOPES
evidence.why: Confirms scope declaration validation implementation matches explorer's description

evidence.summary: evidenceRecordScope() analyzes evidence records and determines scope from field patterns, URL detection, and source type analysis
evidence.why: Verifies scope inference logic for processing various evidence record formats

evidence.summary: evidenceRecordHasDeclaredScope() checks if record explicitly declares valid scope from VALID_EVIDENCE_SCOPES
evidence.why: Confirms core validation function for scope declaration compliance

evidence.summary: evidenceRecordHasProjectLocator() validates project scope records have repo-relative paths, not URLs
evidence.why: Verifies enforcement of concrete file locators for project evidence

evidence.summary: projectEvidenceBlockingIssues() generates blockers when project facts lack project-scoped evidence with path locators; checks if summary.has_project (project scope with locator) before allowing project facts
evidence.why: Confirms enforcement mechanism that external-only evidence cannot satisfy project fact requirements

evidence.summary: evidenceScopeDeclarationIssues() returns EVIDENCE_SCOPE_REQUIRED errors for records without declared valid scope
evidence.why: Confirms validation mechanism that catches missing scope declarations

evidence.summary: PRD readiness validation includes checks for evidenceScopeDeclarationIssues() and projectEvidenceBlockingIssues() for complete evidence results
evidence.why: Verifies scope validation integration into PRD readiness gate

evidence.summary: buildBoundarySnapshot() creates before/after snapshots of project files, excluding allowed artifact roots
Boundary audit compares before/after snapshots and generates BOUNDARY_PROJECT_MUTATION blockers for changes outside allowed artifact roots
evidence.why: Verifies boundary enforcement that detects any evidence agent project mutations

evidence.summary: Execution policy defines boundary: project_mutation: 'forbidden', allowed_write_roots: [repo-relative artifact directory]
evidence.why: Confirms explicit boundary policy in dispatch plan

evidence.summary: Doctrine defines three evidence agent protocols: explorer, cross-checker, verifier
evidence.why: Confirms doctrinal foundation for evidence agent roles

evidence.summary: Doctrine states: '证据记录必须声明 scope: project | external | user | unknown. project 证据来自目标项目的 code、tests、docs、config、logs 或 artifacts，并且必须带 repo-relative path'
evidence.why: Establishes doctrinal requirement for scope declaration and project evidence locators

evidence.summary: Doctrine states: 'external 证据可以来自 WebFetch/WebSearch 或外部文档，但只能作为背景研究，不能单独证明目标项目已有字段、API、状态机或数据流'
evidence.why: Confirms doctrinal prohibition of using external evidence as proof of existing project implementation

assumptions: WebFetch and WebSearch tools are available in the Claude provider environment when research profile is enabled
The current implementation correctly handles all edge cases of scope declaration and validation
The scope inference logic in evidenceRecordScope() handles all possible evidence record formats correctly
risks: If WebFetch/WebSearch tools are not available in the runtime environment, external research requests will fail silently
Scope inference logic in evidenceRecordScope() might not handle all possible evidence record formats
Boundary audit only checks file digests, not other potential mutations like environment variables, external state, or non-file project state
missing: Test files verifying research tool profile enables WebFetch/WebSearch tools in actual Claude provider execution
Test files verifying external evidence marked as scope=external cannot satisfy project fact requirements
Documentation or examples showing correct format for external research evidence records
Evidence that scope validation handles edge cases like malformed URLs or ambiguous path formats
Evidence that boundary audit catches non-file mutations (environment variables, external state, etc.)

result.notes: Cross-check confirms explorer's core claim with high confidence. All 18 evidence records independently verified from source files and documentation. Implementation for scope validation and external research support exists with clear doctrinal alignment. The separation between project facts (requiring path locators) and external evidence is well-implemented through validation functions. Main gaps remain: test coverage for actual provider tool availability, edge case handling, and non-file boundary mutation detection.
